name: Barracuda WAF
description: Barracuda Web Application Firewall REST API v3 for managing virtual services, security policies, access rules, and attack monitoring

auth_config.note: Requires login token obtained from /restapi/v3.2/login endpoint

actions.name: Login
actions.description: Authenticate and obtain an access token for API operations

actions.name: List Services
actions.description: Retrieve all virtual services (protected web applications) on the WAF

actions.name: Get Service
actions.description: Retrieve details of a specific virtual service

parameters.name: service_name
parameters.description: Name of the service to retrieve

actions.name: List Security Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all WAF security policies configured on the appliance

actions.name: Get Security Policy
actions.description: Retrieve a specific WAF security policy configuration

actions.name: Update Security Policy
actions.description: Update settings of an existing WAF security policy

parameters.name: policy_name
parameters.description: Name of the security policy to update

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Policy settings including request limits, URL normalization, and cookie security

actions.name: List Global ACL Rules
actions.description: Retrieve all global access control list rules

actions.name: Create Global ACL Rule
actions.description: Create a new global ACL rule to block or allow traffic by IP

parameters.name: service_name
parameters.description: Name of the service to add the ACL to

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: ACL rule definition including name, ip_address, action (Allow/Deny), and priority

actions.name: Get Attack Logs
actions.description: Retrieve web attack logs and security events from the WAF

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of log entries to return
